# azion_application_function_instance (Resource)

Provides a resource to manage Function Instances for an Application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "azion_application_function_instance" "example" {
  application_id = 1234567890
  data = {
    name        = "Terraform Example"
    function_id = 12345
    active      = true
    args = jsonencode({
      key     = "Value"
      Example = "example"
    })
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `application_id` (Number) The application identifier.
- `data` (Attributes) The function instance configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data))

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `last_updated` (String) Timestamp of the last Terraform update of the resource.

<a id="nestedatt--data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data`

Required:

- `function_id` (Number) The function identifier.
- `name` (String) Name of the function.

Optional:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the function instance is active.
- `args` (String) JSON arguments of the function.

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number) The function instance identifier.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import azion_application_function_instance.example <application_id>/<function_instance_id>
```
